name: Forza Petroleum Limited
summary: Forza Petroleum Limited operates as an oil exploration, development, and production company in the Middle East and West Africa. The company has a 65% participating interest in and operates the Hawler license area located in the Kurdistan Region of Iraq. As of December 31, 2019, it had proved plus probable oil reserves of approximately 103 million barrels. The company was formerly known as Oryx Petroleum Corporation Limited and changed its name to Forza Petroleum Limited in December 2020. Forza Petroleum Limited was founded in 2010 and is based in Calgary, Canada.
